calendar.matters:
MOTION For Order Appointing Judge Pro Tem
Off Calendar Jun-11-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Kelly H. Armstrong, Esq. 928-1293 for pltf/x-deft & opposing party; Michael Tcheng, Esq. 391-6182 for deft/x-complainant & moving party Vena Tambellini.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling, referring matter to Presiding Judge for hearing and possible assignment to Commissioner Norris. (AJR/PB)

MOTION For Order Appointing Judge Pro Tem
Off Calendar May-29-2002 Continued To Jun-11-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Kelly H. Armstrong, Esq. 928-1293 for pltf/x-deft & opposing party Ronald Wilson; Michael K. Tcheng, Esq. 391-6182 for deft/x-complainant & moving party Vena Tambellini.
RULING: Argued and the Court continues the matter to 06/11/02. Pltf to file supplemental declaration by 06/05; deft to file response by 06/07; service by fax or hand. Pltf to prepare order for continuance. (AJR/PB)
